title: Artifact Attic
short_description: Treasures ride a conveyor belt — the curator calls out a civilization and you tap the artifact that belongs to it before it rolls off the end.
description: The museum's grumpy curator lost every label in one enormous sneeze and dumped all the treasures onto a conveyor belt! Each round he calls out a civilization and you race to tap the artifact that belongs to it — pyramids, the Colosseum, the Terracotta Army, Viking longships — before it rolls off the end into the wrong crate. Grab the wrong one and the mummy gets offended. It's a real-time sorting arcade game that teaches world history by connecting famous artifacts to Ancient Egypt, Rome, Greece, China, the Maya, the Inca and more, with a fun fact on every miss. Grade bands ramp from super-famous treasures, to more civilizations, to trickier and less-famous artifacts, and the belt speeds up every round. A free online ancient civilizations and world history game for kids in grades 2–5, with quick-grab and streak bonuses feeding your score and GP.
controls: Mouse / tap the artifact that belongs to the called-out civilization as it rides the conveyor belt, before it rolls off the end.
